analysis.name: coderet
analysis.type: Nucleic Translation, Data retrieval Sequence data
analysis.description: Extract CDS, mRNA and translations from feature tables

base.name: osformat_cdsoutseq
base.prompt: Format for: Coding nucleotide output sequence(s) (optional)

base.name: osformat_mrnaoutseq
base.prompt: Format for: Messenger RNA nucleotide output sequence(s) (optional)

base.name: osformat_translationoutseq
base.prompt: Format for: Translated coding protein output sequence(s) (optional)

base.name: osformat_restoutseq
base.prompt: Format for: Non-coding nucleotide output sequence(s) (optional)
